title: You Can Count on Kinme
overview: Kinme Wakana runs a small laundry in Atami, where everyday life unfolds into heartfelt, bittersweet stories.

title: We're Proud of Our Natural Hot Spring
overview: Kinme tries out the Ishimochis' bath and then meets a bubbly young girl who wants to learn all about cleaning.

title: Closed All Day Today
overview: Customers start worrying about Kinme when she accidentally sleeps in after a night on the town.

title: A Personal Request from Kinme
overview: Kinme teaches a high schooler about garment care and watches Nairo practice drumming for the Kogashi Festival.

title: I Have a Feeling…
overview: After staying up to clean the stained jackets for the festival, Kinme ventures out to join in the celebration.

title: Pop, Pop, Boom
overview: The hostess at a lavish hotel asks Kinme to clean an old doll and rewards her with time in the hotel's baths.

title: You Should Leverage Your Assets!!
overview: A pushy salesman talks Kinme into setting up a social media account with the help of Nairo and her classmates.

title: That Was Too Impressive
overview: Kinme meets a shy location coordinator who talks her into modeling for a fun photoshoot on nearby Hatsushima.

title: Power's Out
overview: A storm leaves Kinme and Kyusho trapped inside the dry cleaners.

title: A Top-Class Challenge!
overview: Kinme battles a tough ink stain and enjoys lunch with Hatsuayu while workers repair the damage from the storm.

title: To Help This Little Guy Out
overview: Kyusho keeps daydreaming about someone and Kinme decides to clean a fluffy friend that somebody left behind.

title: Local Cleaning with a Heart
overview: One of Kinme Cleaning's regular customers has a health emergency as Kinme's shop nears its second anniversary.
